title: attendance — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `attendance_capture` is the master. Kiosk / QR / freeze-enforcement land on Small+. Geofence + advanced policies + no-show fees + analytics gate to Medium+. Extended retention is Enterprise-only for compliance holds.

entitlements.description: Master gate. When OFF (never at Stackra defaults — reserved for support tooling to disable a tenant's attendance surface during an incident), every attendance write returns 403 ATTENDANCE_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED.
enforcedBy: SDUI check-in surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'attendance.capture'

entitlements.description: Self-service kiosk check-in path. When OFF, only coach_verified / admin_recorded / geofence / qr_scan check-ins are accepted. Kiosk UI hidden.
enforcedBy: AttendanceRecordObserver.creating refuses checked_in_via='self_kiosk' when gate off (returns ATTENDANCE_SELF_KIOSK_NOT_ENTITLED)
SDUI kiosk-check-in-app surface hidden when features array does not include 'attendance.self_kiosk'

entitlements.description: GPS/geofence-verified check-ins. Requires the products/geofencing module. When OFF, checked_in_via='geofence' refuses.
enforcedBy: AttendanceRecordObserver.creating refuses checked_in_via='geofence' when gate off
attendance.geofence_verify middleware skips validation when gate off

entitlements.description: QR-code check-in path. Athletes scan a per-session QR code posted at the venue. Rate-limited to prevent scan-spam via attendance.rate_limit middleware.
enforcedBy: AttendanceRecordObserver.creating refuses checked_in_via='qr_scan' when gate off

entitlements.description: Per-membership-plan attendance policies. When OFF, only branch-wide policies (membership_plan_id IS NULL) are supported. Small tier uses a single tenant-wide fallback policy.
enforcedBy: AttendancePolicyObserver.creating refuses membership_plan_id IS NOT NULL when gate off

entitlements.description: Auto-invoice for no-show fees. When ON + policy.no_show_fee_cents > 0, ChargeNoShowFeeJob dispatches invoice creation via finance::invoice. When OFF, no_show_fee_cents on a policy is ignored (SDUI still allows setting it but no invoice fires).
enforcedBy: ChargeNoShowFeeJob no-ops for tenants without the entitlement
AttendancePolicyObserver.creating warns when no_show_fee_cents > 0 without this entitlement (soft-warn — allowed but flags)

entitlements.description: Auto-freeze membership on absence threshold. When ON, EvaluateAbsenceThresholdOnAbsenceRecorded fires AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached which pauses the membership. When OFF, the threshold event still fires (audit trail) but the FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached hook no-ops.
enforcedBy: FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached hook checks the gate before pausing membership

entitlements.description: Attendance-rate reports + per-coach / per-branch / per-season aggregates. When OFF, `GET /api/v1/reports/attendance` returns 402 UPGRADE_REQUIRED.
enforcedBy: GenerateAttendanceReportJob no-ops for tenants without the entitlement
Reports route middleware refuses with 402 UPGRADE_REQUIRED

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends attendance-record retention from 7 years to 10 years post-session for regulatory / litigation-hold scenarios. Absence records unchanged (3-year retention).
enforcedBy: PurgeCompletedAttendanceJob applies the appropriate retention window per tenant entitlement
